# kSecMatchPolicy

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates a policy with which a matching certificate or identity must verify.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecMatchPolicy: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecPolicy].
